parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'health_alert', topic: 'infrastructure_failure', content: $json.summary + '\n\n' + $json.all_statuses_text, importance: $json.importance, source: 'n8n_health_alert_workflow' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'system_event', topic: 'infrastructure_ok', content: $json.summary + ' — ' + $json.timestamp, importance: 2, source: 'n8n_health_alert_workflow' }) }}
